reviewComments.comment: Any user with proper privileges (Update Products), not only admins.

anchor.heading: User Story 2 - Remove a Product Image (Priority: P2)
User Story 2 - Remove a Product Image (Priority: P2)
anchor.blockText: 2. **Given** a product has no photo, **When** an administrator sends an update with `photo` set to null, **Then** the request succeeds with no error.

reviewComments.comment: system try to create it if that fails system exits

anchor.heading: User Story 2 - Remove a Product Image (Priority: P2)
User Story 2 - Remove a Product Image (Priority: P2)
anchor.blockText: **Independent Test**: Upload an image, then clear it via a product update and confirm the `photo` field returns null.

reviewComments.comment: size limit should be in app settings, default: 2 MB
